name: pension-am-tier-boundary
behaviors: PENSION_AM_2026 constants: LOW_CEIL=500000, CAP_THRESHOLD=1125000, CAP=87500, LOW_RATE=5, HIGH_RATE=10, HIGH_OFFSET=25000
CAP_THRESHOLD is exactly 15x minimum wage (75,000 AMD)
Middle tier (500k < g ≤ 1.125M): 10% × g - 25,000 → integer AMD
Continuity at 500,000 boundary: diff ≤ 1 AMD (Math.round handles float drift)
Continuity at 1,125,000 boundary: exact equality (cap catches both sides)
pensionAmMonthly and pensionAmAnnual delegate correctly to pensionAmTier
pension_am.js has NO fs require (pure functions only)
rationale: Wrong numbers = tax liabilities. Tier boundaries + rates are per RA Tax Code Art. 156 + Decree N 1332-Ն.
